title: 9675078380 Car Exhaust Pipe Rubber Fixing Bracket, Replacement for Citroen C4 Replacement for Peugeot 308 3008 5008, Replaces 9674325380
features: Fitment: Replacement for Citroen C4 2013 2014 2016 2018, Replacement for Peugeot 308 II 2013-2014, 308 SW II 2014, 3008 MPV 2015-2016, 3008 SUV 2016-2020, 5008 II 2016 2018, 5008 II Van 2018

Effective Vibration Damping: The bracket has excellent vibration damping performance, which helps to reduce the vibration of the exhaust system during driving, and improve driving comfort and vehicle stability
Endurance Property: Adoption of high-temperature and corrosion-resistant rubber materials ensures the endurance and reliability of the bracket in extreme environments and prolongs its service life
Easy Installation: The bracket is designed with your actual needs in mind, reducing the complexity of installation. Only basic tools are needed to complete the installation, saving time and energy
description: Fitment: Replacement for Citroen Models: C4 GRAND PICASSO II 2013-2014 C4 PICASSO II 2013 2014 2016 C4 SPACETOURER 2018 GRAND C4 SPACETOURER 2018 Replacement for Peugeot Models: 3008 MPV 2015-2016 3008 SUV 2016-2020 308 II 2013-2021 308 SW II 2014-2021 5008 II 2016 2018 Replace Part Number: 9675078380, 9674325380 Package Includes: 1* Car Exhaust Pipe Rubber Fixing Bracket
